name: mcp-server-safety
description: Governance for Varden MCP server tools (varden_guard, varden_put_policy, varden_log_event).

block.title: Block destructive action via MCP guard
block.name: mcp_block_destructive_guard
block.description: Blocks MCP guard calls for destructive database tools.

block.title: Block MCP guard with secrets
block.name: mcp_block_guard_secrets
block.description: Blocks MCP guard submissions with secret-like material.

block.title: Block MCP guard recursive delete
block.name: mcp_block_guard_rm_rf
block.description: Blocks rm -rf in MCP guard payloads.

block.title: Block MCP guard metadata SSRF
block.name: mcp_block_guard_metadata_ssrf
block.description: Blocks cloud metadata targets in MCP guard payloads.

warn.title: Warn on MCP policy mutation
warn.name: mcp_warn_put_policy
warn.description: Warns when MCP client modifies live policy.

warn.title: Warn on MCP direct log bypass
warn.name: mcp_warn_log_event
warn.description: Warns on guard bypass via direct log.

warn.title: Warn on MCP guard high risk
warn.name: mcp_warn_guard_high_risk
warn.description: Warns on high-risk MCP guard submissions.

warn.title: Warn on MCP guard HTTP action
warn.name: mcp_warn_guard_http
warn.description: Warns when MCP guard authorizes HTTP actions.
